innateAbility.name: Lvl ? Pain
innateAbility.description: Attacks now apply a debuff that accumulates the incoming damage taken sourced to Lucifer on the debuff-affected enemy.After a delay, the debuff deals damage within the radius equal to a percentage of the damage taken from Lucifer previously.

abilities.name: Devour
abilities.description: Consumes and instant kills the enemy or neutral creep, acquiring any special abilities that it possessed.

abilities.name: Devoured Ability 1
abilities.description: This slot will be replaced by abilities acquired with Devour.

abilities.name: Devoured Ability 2
abilities.description: This slot will be replaced by abilities acquired with Devour.

abilities.name: Scorched Earth
abilities.description: Grants an aura that damages enemy units within the radius, while also granting Lucifer bonus movement speed.

abilities.name: Infernal Blade
abilities.description: Applies a bash and burns for a base damage plus a percentage of the target's max health as damage per second.

abilities.name: Doom
abilities.description: Inflicts a curse that dispels an enemy hero, prevents them from casting spells or healing in any way, while taking damage over time.

talents.left: +1.5% Infernal Blade Max Health to Damage
